calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And To Modify To Correct Drafting Error.
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lynn Searle for Trustees.

Ms. Searle presented oral argument to support her position. Upon of conclusion of argument, the Court expressed its concerns and denied the Petition for Instructions but granted the Petition to Modify to Correct Drafting Error. The Court will re-draft the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Instructions And To Modify To Correct Drafting Error.
Off Calendar May-08-2012 Continued To May-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
